name: UMENOHANA Co., Ltd.
summary: Umenohana Co., Ltd. engages in the restaurant business in Japan. It operates through Restaurant and Takeout segments. The company's restaurants offer tofu and tofu skin-based dishes, crab dishes, Chinese food, and deli items. It also provides sushi, rice, pork dumplings, tofu skin, and bento dishes through takeout stores. It operates restaurants under Umenohana, Kanishige, China Umenohana, Koichian, and Umenohana Takeout brand names. The company was formerly known as K.K. Ume Corporation and changed its name to Umenohana Co., Ltd. in October 1997. Umenohana Co., Ltd. was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Kurume, Japan.
